description_short: Kinetic Circuits sells development boards, sensor kits, and debugging tools for embedded engineers, alongside a free desktop app called KC Studio.
description_long:
Kinetic Circuits is a supplier of embedded-development hardware: ARM and RISC-V dev boards, LoRa and CAN transceivers, logic analyzers, and its own KC-Link programmer. A free desktop app, KC Studio, flashes firmware and decodes serial traffic for the catalog.

The site reads primarily as a hardware catalog with wholesale and education pricing; it does not state the company's age, funding, or scale, so whether this is a venture-scale software startup is unclear from the text.
